title: Chelympics — Initiation Rules and Scoring
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir documents the Chelympics initiation: 1 beer + 1 shot per person, then a seven-event tournament structured like a drinking olympiad.
  • Events in order: team flip cup → card-stack tower (3 stories) → highest dart throw (2 throws each, total scored) → team cup pong time-trial → Kahoot → halftime ritual led by Charis → beer ball tournament → face frenzy → karaoke.
  • Scoring: 1st 5pts, 2nd 4pts, 3rd 3pts, 4th 2pts, 5th 1pt; -1 for falling, -2 for throwing up, +1 for best photos and best sportsmanship.
  • Karaoke songs assigned per person: Dove / "Thriller," Francis / "We Are Young," Schlong / "Baby Shark," Charis / "Tequila," La Croix / "American Girl."
  • Real penalties logged: Charis -0.5 (fell), Francis -1 (Owen fall) and Luke -1 ("cum mustard"), Dove +1 ("grab cocking" by Hemmy), Charis +1 best sportsmanship.

Notes

A genuinely funny Chelympics artifact — Yahir as the rule-keeper documenting both the structure and the live scoring deltas of an actual run. The format is olympics-as-ritual: numbered events, point ladder, deductions for body-failure, bonuses for camaraderie. The halftime detail ("Charis leads thru ritual") promotes Chelympics from "drinking game" to something with internal liturgy.

Belongs in the friends as ritual neighborhood and pairs with the manifesto-mode notes — same Yahir, opposite end of the seriousness spectrum. The cast (Charis, Dove, Francis, Schlong, La Croix, Luke, Owen, Hemmy) is the recurring social ring around Yahir in this period; nicknames suggest a tight enough group that they have collective in-jokes worth preserving on paper.

Connections

  • chelympics — concept page this note seeds.
  • charis — recurring host/ritual leader in this circle.
  • dove / francis — named participants.
  • friends rituals — adjacent concept.
